final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial photo of a young woman in traditional Hanfu standing on a stone arch bridge in a Jiangnan water town.

Style/medium: Chinese gongbi painting meets xieyi ink wash, delicate brushwork with soft ink diffusion, Eastern aesthetic sensibility
Composition: medium shot at eye level, woman centered on stone arch bridge, umbrella framing face, river and boat in lower third
Subject: young woman in traditional Hanfu, holding an oil-paper umbrella painted with blue-and-white porcelain patterns, umbrella partially covering face, gentle and distant gaze
Scene/backdrop: Jiangnan water town, stone arch bridge over flowing river, black-awning boat passing underneath, boatman wearing bamboo hat, white-walled Hui-style architecture with dark tiles reflected in water, pink walls covered in green ivy, wooden window lattices carved with floral and bird motifs
Lighting/mood: overcast sky with dense clouds, fine drizzle like silk threads, misty rain atmosphere enveloping the scene, soft and ethereal mood
Color palette: muted and elegant tones, soft grays and blues as base, warm touches of traditional Hanfu colors as accent, ink wash gradations
Materials/textures: flowing silk fabric of Hanfu, oiled paper texture of umbrella, weathered stone of bridge, smooth water surface with reflections, carved wood grain of window lattices
Avoid: saturated neon colors, harsh shadows, modern elements, western architectural details, oversharpening, 8K stuffer aesthetic
